---
title: ""
output: html_document
date: ''
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

**1. Decipher the functions of human brain related disease-associated common genetic variants**  

I utilize Hi-C/HiChIP to link the human brain related disease-associated common genetic variants to their cognate genes.  


**2. Predict the functions of Cis-Regulatory Elements in gene transcription**  

I am trying to build deep learning models including Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), Residual Networks (ResNet), and Transformer to predict the roles of Cis-Regulatory Elements (CREs) in gene transcription.
